mapper.insert: insert into fulfillment_task(order_id, order_number, pickup_code, status, pickup_deadline, completed_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{orderId}, #{orderNumber}, #{pickupCode}, #{status}, #{pickupDeadline}, #{completedTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}) on duplicate key update order_number = values(order_number), pickup_code = values(pickup_code), pickup_deadline = values(pickup_deadline), update_time = values(update_time)
